thesis: Off-market underutilized parcels in dev-friendly zones; land anchored to real vacant-land sale comps; underwritten to your 85% LTC thesis.

program_assumptions.note: Screening estimates. Program terms per HPD/485-x rules (Jan 2025) and City of Yes UAP; rents/costs are published, editable assumptions — not appraisals.

assumptions.land_blend: 60% real vacant-land sale comps ($/SF by borough, last 18mo) + 40% assessed x2
assumptions.note: Screening estimates for outreach, not appraisals. Every number derived from public data + these published assumptions.
